ChangeRequest.name: add members to ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTN
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview Due to Anacredit reporting we need to add the following members to attribute ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTN: ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTN_5 | nGAAP: Available-for-sale financial assets ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTN_12 | nGAAP: Held-to-maturity investments ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTN_46 | nGAAP: Financial assets held for trading ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTN_48 | nGAAP: Non-trading financial assets mandatorily at fair value through profit or loss | ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTN_10 | nGAAP: Loans and receivables to the cube INSTRMNT_RL in EIL and in the LMD _
### Contact person @Silvia.Giacinti
### Description of change request Add members to the attribute ACCNTNG_CLSSFCTN
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes _[LDM, EIL ]_
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
